/workspaces/bf/tilck/toolchain4/host/linux-x86_64/portable/gcc-x86_64-musl/13.3.0/bin/x86_64-linux-g++ -fPIC -g -nostdlib -Wl,--script=/workspaces/bf/tilck/toolchain4/gcc-13.3.0/x86_64/gnuefi/3.0.17/gnuefi/elf_x86_64_efi.lds -Wl,-znocombreloc -Wl,-Bsymbolic -shared -Wl,-soname,libefi_app_x86_64.so -o libefi_app_x86_64.so
